payload.text: I was double-charged $49 this month and I'd like a refund for the duplicate charge.
payload.topic: I was double-charged $49 this month and I'd like a refund for the duplicate charge.

payload.subject: I was double-charged $49 this month and I'd like a refund for the duplicate charge.
payload.body: I was double-charged $49 this month and I'd like a refund for the duplicate charge.

decide.label: approve
decide.reasoning: A duplicate/double charge is a clear billing error covered by refund policy.

draft_reply.reply:
Hi there,

Thank you for reaching out, and I'm sorry for the trouble the extra charge caused this month. I completely understand how concerning it is to see a payment you didn't expect.

I've looked into this, and you're absolutely right — you were charged $49 twice for the same item. A duplicate charge like this is a clear billing error, and it's fully covered by our refund policy, so I've approved a refund of the duplicate $49 charge.

You don't need to do anything further on your end. The refund will be issued back to your original payment method, and it typically takes 5–10 business days to appear, depending on your bank or card provider.

Thank you for your patience and for bringing this to our attention. If you have any questions in the meantime or notice anything else that doesn't look right, please don't hesitate to reply — I'm happy to help.

Warm regards,
Customer Support
